bt_d_future: Future datesShift click: plus one day
bt_d_past: Past datesShift click: minus one day
pk_rotation: RotationRight click: predefined rotation values
pk_rotation_pop: Open the rulerRight click: predefined rotation values
bt_picture: Picture tool, import from Genie libraryCde or Ctrl to import Picture from disk
pk_zoom: ZoomRight click: Predefined zoom values
pk_zoom_pop: Open the rulerRight click: predefined zoom values
pk_opacity_pop: Open the rulerRight click: predefined opacity values
